name: BBC News Scotland
notes: Scotland news including aviation, airports, transport. Attribution required per BBC Terms.

name: BBC News UK
notes: UK news including aviation, airports, RAF. Attribution required per BBC Terms.

name: FlightGlobal
notes: Aviation industry news. Filter to UK/Scotland aviation for relevance. Feed checked 2026-03-10: still returns 404 (unavailable).

name: The Scotsman
notes: Scotland's national newspaper. Filter to aviation/transport for relevance.

name: Civil Aviation Authority
notes: Aviation safety, regulation, licensing. UK-wide relevance.

name: Royal Air Force
attribution: Source: Royal Air Force (© Crown Copyright/OGL v3.0)
notes: Uses the GOV.UK Content API to avoid Cloudflare blocking on the public RSS feed.

name: Ministry of Defence
attribution: Source: UK Ministry of Defence (OGL v3.0)
notes: Filter to aviation topics via keyword matching (RAF, Fleet Air Arm, aerospace).

name: Highlands and Islands Airports Ltd
attribution: Source: Highlands and Islands Airports Ltd
notes: Scrapes the public HIAL newsroom listings (no RSS available) and stores title, summary, and publish date with attribution.

name: Department for Transport
attribution: Source: UK Department for Transport (OGL v3.0)
notes: Includes aviation connectivity announcements, airport funding, and regulatory statements relevant to Scotland.

name: Air Accidents Investigation Branch
attribution: Source: Air Accidents Investigation Branch (OGL v3.0)
notes: Accident bulletins and safety recommendations; flag for editor review before publication.
